reviews.name: Dr. Martinez
reviews.message: I used to get caught with dead batteries at the worst times. HearTrackerr fixed that completely.

reviews.name: Sarah K.
reviews.message: Simple and does exactly what it says. I love that it works offline — no fuss.

reviews.name: James P.
reviews.message: I manage my mother's hearing aids. This app makes it easy to stay on top of her battery changes.
